title: Configure a new connection correctly
description: Apply the standard pragma set on open so concurrency, durability, and integrity behave predictably.
body: Steps: 1. On first open of the database set PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL (persists in the file). 2. On every connection set busy_timeout (e.g. 5000), foreign_keys=ON, and synchronous=NORMAL (with WAL). 3. Decide cache_size and mmap_size if the working set is large. 4. For a read-then-write transaction use BEGIN IMMEDIATE. 5. Verify the pragmas with a SELECT on PRAGMA values at startup. Rollback point: pragmas are per-connection (except journal_mode) so reverting is just changing the open routine. Validation: a startup check confirms WAL is active, foreign_keys is on, and busy_timeout is non-zero on each connection.
